summary: E2E tested 3 REBUILT features: Story Episode Creator (3-step), Content Challenge Planner (4-step), Caption Rewriter Pro (3-step). All backend APIs pass 25/25 tests. All frontend wizard UIs verified with Playwright.
features_tested: Story Episode Creator - 3-step wizard (Idea → Length → Generate)
Story Episode Creator - Copyright blocking (disney, marvel, pokemon, etc.)
Story Episode Creator - Add-ons: Export PDF (+10cr), Commercial License (+15cr)
Content Challenge Planner - 4-step wizard (Platform → Duration → Goal → Generate)
Content Challenge Planner - 5 platforms: Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, Kids Channel, Business
Content Challenge Planner - 4 goals: Followers, Sales, Engagement, Brand Growth
Content Challenge Planner - Daily plan includes hook, content_idea, caption, cta, hashtags
Caption Rewriter Pro - 3-step wizard (Text → Tone → Generate)
Caption Rewriter Pro - 6 tones only: Funny, Luxury, Bold, Emotional, Motivational, Storytelling
Caption Rewriter Pro - Pricing: Single=5cr, 3Tones=12cr, AllTones=20cr
Caption Rewriter Pro - 3 variations per tone
Dashboard shows all 3 REBUILT features with badges
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features use template-based generation (zero AI cost)
Copyright protection implemented on all 3 features - blocks Disney, Marvel, Pokemon, etc.
Watermark message shown for free users on all features
Pricing is clear and visible at each step
data-testid attributes present for all key UI elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 REBUILT features fully functional. Routes: /app/story-episode-creator (3-step), /app/content-challenge-planner (4-step), /app/caption-rewriter (3-step). All use template-based generation with zero AI cost.

story_episode_creator.cliffhangers: VERIFIED (generated for all episodes except final)
